method: National-scale (Argentina) ratings sourced 2026-06-11 from FIX SCR emisor pages (fixscr.com/emisor/view, current rating + latest action date), FIX press releases, Moody's Local AR informes de calificacion (moodyslocal.com.ar PDFs) and issuer IR pages. scope='series' only where the specific ON class is listed with its own rating on the agency page; otherwise scope='issuer' (FIX/ML press releases confirm 'emisor y ONs vigentes' jointly, but the class was not individually verified - typical for the international RegS/144A classes). When series and issuer ratings differ the series rating governs (no such case arose: every verified series rating equals its issuer rating).
tierRule: tier 1 = AAA(arg)/AA+(arg) (FIX national scale) or AAA.ar/AA+.ar (Moody's Local AR modern national scale, equivalents of legacy Aaa.ar/Aa1.ar); tier 2 = AA(arg) through A-(arg) or AA.ar through A-.ar (legacy Aa2.ar-A3.ar); tier 3 = BBB+(arg)/BBB+.ar and below, or no verifiable national-scale rating (unrated). Series rating governs over issuer rating when they differ.

ratings.note: Clase XXXIV (intl RegS/144A 8.25% 2034). FIX confirms emisor LP y ONs vigentes AAA(arg) (latest action 2026-05-05); this class not individually listed on the emisor page, issuer rating applied.

Clase XXXI (intl 8.75% 2031). FIX confirms emisor LP y ONs vigentes AAA(arg) (latest action 2026-05-05); this class not individually listed on the emisor page, issuer rating applied.

ON Clase XXXIX listed AAA(arg) estable on FIX emisor page, confirmed 2026-05-05.

ratings.issuer: Transportadora de Gas del Sur S.A. (TGS)
ratings.note: No verifiable national-scale (Argentina) rating found for TGS or ON Clase 4 (7.75% 2035): FIX SCR coverage withdrawn years ago (last local actions ~2006-2012), no TGS entries at moodyslocal.com.ar, no raXXX S&P national rating found. Press at issuance (Nov-2025) cites only international-scale ratings (e.g. Moody's B2 for the notes); S&P intl issuer B-/stable (feb-2025). Treated as unrated on national scale.
